details: The agent navigated to https://github.com/torvalds/linux/blob/master/Makefile and read the actual file content. The snapshot clearly shows VERSION = 7 and PATCHLEVEL = 0, which the agent correctly reported. The agent did get confused in its final commentary (incorrectly mentioning 6.14-rc7) but the core answer of VERSION=7 and PATCHLEVEL=0 was read directly from the page and reported correctly.
